name: ISMS.online
description: ISMS.online — SaaS platform for ISO 27001 and SOC 2 implementation with pre-built policy templates and auditor collaboration.

seo.title: ISMS.online — Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec
seo.meta_description: ISMS.online: ISMS.online — SaaS platform for ISO 27001 and SOC 2 implementation with pre-built policy templates and auditor collaboration.

when_to_use: ISO 27001 ISMS implementation with pre-built policy templates
SOC 2 readiness with controls library and auditor portal
GDPR compliance documentation in ISMS framework
Risk register and treatment plan management for CISO
Supplier risk assessment integrated with ISMS controls

pros: Pre-built ISO 27001 and SOC 2 content speeds first audit
Auditor collaboration features avoid evidence email chains
Policy templates are actually usable, not generic boilerplate
Clear Annex A mapping and gap tracking built in
cons: UI gets cluttered as ISMS grows past initial scope
Evidence automation weaker than Vanta or Drata
Per-user pricing adds up for larger compliance teams
Limited integrations outside common cloud and HR tools
review.verdict: Solid ISO 27001 companion with strong templates; weaker on automated evidence than newer GRC entrants.
review.best_for: Teams preparing for their first ISO 27001 or SOC 2 and wanting guided frameworks.
review.not_for: Mature orgs needing deep integration-based evidence automation across dozens of systems.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Standard subscription/seat plan; downgradable next cycle.
